title: JBM170 Heart Rate Experiment — Participant Dataset
description: Schema for pseudonymized running-experiment data files (JBM170_HR_Day1-21_P<ID>.json). Each file contains participant metadata and a list of running sessions with per-sample Heart Rate (BPM) recordings.

age.description: Age of the participant at time of experiment (years).

lifetime_sports_activity.description: Total months of sports participation across the participant's lifetime.

target_speed.description: Prescribed running pace for the experimental protocol (km/h).

watch_type.description: Model of wearable device used to record heart rate (e.g., 'Samsung Galaxy Watch 7').

runs.description: Ordered list of running sessions for this participant.

metadata.description: Environmental and contextual metadata for this session.

atm_pressure.description: Atmospheric pressure at session time, sourced from Open-Meteo historical API (hPa).

temperature.description: Ambient air temperature at session time, sourced from Open-Meteo historical API (°C).

altitude.description: Altitude above sea level of the session location (metres).

sleep_duration.description: Total sleep duration on the night preceding the session (minutes).

daily_activity.description: Non-running physical activity on the session day — e.g., walking, cycling, gym (minutes).

steps_count.description: Total step count for the session day.

per_second_data.description: Time-series of Heart Rate (BPM) samples recorded during the session.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 absolute timestamp of the sample.

heart_rate.description: Heart Rate (BPM) measured by the wearable sensor at this timestamp.
